name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the world's largest pawn operator with 3,300+ locations in the U.S., UK, and Latin America, offering collateral-based loans and used merchandise retail.
description_long:
FirstCash Holdings, Inc. is a publicly traded company (NASDAQ: FCFS) headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas, and the undisputed global leader in pawn retail. With over 3,300 locations spanning 29 U.S. states and the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America — including all Mexican states plus Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador — FirstCash is a component of both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and the Russell 2000 Index. The company employs approximately 22,000 people across its international operations.

FirstCash's core business is collateral-based pawn lending: customers bring in personal property, receive a small non-recourse loan based on the item's appraised resale value, and can reclaim the item by repaying the loan plus fees within a set period. If the loan is not repaid, FirstCash retains the item for resale — no debt collection, no credit reporting. Beyond loans, FirstCash buys and sells a wide variety of used merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. The company also purchases gold, silver, and platinum for immediate cash payment, offers a layaway plan requiring just 10% down, and through its wholly owned subsidiary AFF, provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through a network of over 15,000 active merchant partner locations nationwide.

Scale and regulatory accountability set FirstCash apart from independent pawn shops. Its 3,300+ store footprint means most U.S. consumers live near a location. As a publicly traded company subject to SEC disclosure requirements, FirstCash operates with a level of corporate transparency uncommon in the pawn industry. The non-recourse loan structure is a meaningful consumer protection: borrowers who cannot repay forfeit only the pledged collateral — they cannot be sued, have wages garnished, or suffer credit damage as a result of the unpaid loan.

FirstCash serves a real need for cash- and credit-constrained consumers who need immediate liquidity without a credit application or waiting period. However, the cost of pawn loans is high — fees are set by state law but frequently translate to effective annual rates of 100–300% or more, making them far more expensive than personal loans or credit union products. Loan amounts are also capped by the item's appraised resale value, which stores set unilaterally, typically well below retail value. Customers who forfeit collateral permanently lose their items, which can be significant for sentimental or high-value goods. FirstCash is a legitimate last-resort option for those with no credit access and tangible assets — but it should not be a first choice when cheaper credit is available.
pros: No credit check required — loan approval based solely on the pledged item's value
Non-recourse loans mean forfeiting collateral does not result in debt collection, lawsuits, or credit damage
3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, UK, and Latin America — among the most accessible lenders in the country
Same-day cash — loans are funded immediately after in-store appraisal, no waiting period
Buys gold, silver, and platinum for immediate cash payout
Layaway available on retail purchases with just 10% down
Publicly traded (NASDAQ: FCFS) with SEC oversight — more accountable than independent pawn operators
cons: Pawn loan fees translate to very high effective APRs (commonly 100–300%+), varying by state law
Loan amounts are limited to a fraction of the item's retail value — stores control appraisal offers
Forfeiting unredeemed collateral means permanently losing the item, including sentimental property
No online loan application — must visit a physical store in person
AFF lease-to-own products (through merchant partners) carry their own high costs and are separate from pawn loans
best_for: Consumers with no credit history or damaged credit who need fast cash without a credit check
People with valuable personal property — jewelry, electronics, tools — who need short-term liquidity
Bargain shoppers looking for used merchandise at below-retail prices
Individuals who want to sell gold, silver, or platinum for immediate cash payment
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers who have no credit access and own valuable personal property they can pledge as collateral for a fast, no-questions-asked loan. The key caveat is cost — pawn loan fees are substantially higher than conventional credit products, and items not redeemed within the loan period are permanently forfeited, making this a true last-resort option rather than a routine borrowing strategy.
services: Non-recourse pawn loans secured by personal property
Purchase of used jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Retail sale of used merchandise across all product categories
Gold, silver, and platinum buying for immediate cash
Retail finance/point-of-sale payment solutions through merchant partners (via AFF)
Store locator for 2,500+ North and Latin American locations
